ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "parent_company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent company (if any) */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry the company belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the company is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the company is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the company's location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company website */,
  "ein" TEXT /* Employer Identification Number (EIN) */,
  "ownership_type" TEXT /* Type of ownership (e.g., private, public) */,
  "business_sector" TEXT /* Business sector the company belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_parent_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_company_id") REFERENCES parent_companies ("parent_company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parent_companies" (
  "parent_company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parent company */,
  "parent_company_name" TEXT /* Name of the parent company */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry the parent company belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the parent company */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the parent company is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the parent company is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the parent company's location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the parent company is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the parent company */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the parent company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Parent company website */,
  "ein" TEXT /* Parent company EIN */,
  "ownership_type" TEXT /* Type of ownership (e.g., private, public) */,
  "business_sector" TEXT /* Business sector the parent company belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parent_company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violations" (
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each violation */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company that committed the violation */,
  "violation_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of violation */,
  "violation_date" TEXT /* Date when the violation occurred */,
  "penalty_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the penalty imposed */,
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inspection that identified the violation */,
  "enforcement_agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the enforcement agency that issued the penalty */,
  "violation_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the violation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the violation (e.g., open, closed, pending) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the violation was resolved */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, waived) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_inspection_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspection_id") REFERENCES inspections ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_enforcement_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("enforcement_agency_id") REFERENCES enforcement_agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_violation_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("violation_type_id") REFERENCES violation_types ("violation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violation_types" (
  "violation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each violation type */,
  "violation_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the violation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the violation type */,
  "fine_range" TEXT /* Range of fines for this violation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company that was inspected */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date when the inspection was conducted */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inspector who conducted the inspection */,
  "inspection_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of inspection */,
  "inspection_report" TEXT /* Report of the inspection findings */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inspection (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_inspection_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspection_type_id") REFERENCES inspection_types ("inspection_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES inspectors ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspection_types" (
  "inspection_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection type */,
  "inspection_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspection type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the inspection type */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* How often the inspection is conducted (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspectors" (
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspector */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the inspector */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the inspector */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the enforcement agency the inspector belongs to */,
  "certification_date" TEXT /* Date when the inspector was certified */,
  "certification_status" TEXT /* Current certification status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspectors_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES enforcement_agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enforcement_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enforcement agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the enforcement agency */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the enforcement agency */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the enforcement agency is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the enforcement agency is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the enforcement agency's location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the enforcement agency is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the enforcement agency */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the enforcement agency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Enforcement agency website */,
  "jurisdiction" TEXT /* Area under the agency's jurisdiction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regulator, analyst, auditor) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access for the user (e.g., admin, read-only) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the violation record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the violation record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the violation record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_violation_id FOREIGN KEY ("violation_id") REFERENCES violations ("violation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violation_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the violation the document is related to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., inspection report, legal document) */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violation_documents_violation_id FOREIGN KEY ("violation_id") REFERENCES violations ("violation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "training_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training program */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the training (e.g., hours, days) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* How often the training is offered (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "training_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who participated */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the training was completed */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Status of the participant's completion (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_participants_training_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("training_id")
)
